---
title: "Quarto + R: Exploratory Data Analysis"
subtitle: "Using Reveal.js with R"
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard:
      buttons: false
    preview-links: auto
    theme: default
jupyter: false
editor: visual
---

## Welcome

This presentation demonstrates an R-only Reveal.js slide deck built with Quarto.

---

## R Chunk: Summary Statistics

```{r}
summary(mtcars)
